summary: Frontend-only E2E review of the SAHIL KHAN portfolio (icarus13-inspired, blue palette). Tested loader→portfolio transition, glass nav with smooth scroll, hero (eyebrow, stacked SAHIL/KHAN. with blue period, AI Engineer, India·Remote-friendly, bio, Explore Work/Get In Touch CTAs, social links, Resume link, 3 stats), About, Skills (The stack. with 4 columns), Education (2 cards), Projects (exactly 5 numbered P·01..P·05 with HackQuest25 1st place badge), expand-via-'+' AND expand-via-title for hackquest25 + orchestratex with tech chips and 2-col Key Features, '+' rotates 45° into 'x', GitHub hrefs (HackQuest25→/HackQuest25, others→/sahilkhn-03), Contact (heading, paragraph, India·Remote-friendly, terminal block with mac dots, ~/sahil · zsh header, sahil@nodes lines, blinking cursor, mailto link, GitHub + LinkedIn cards). Verified NO contact form (0 <form>, 0 inputs/textarea, 0 'Send message'). Body background = rgb(8,11,20) ≈ #080B14, blue/violet accents only, no green/matrix. 44/46 raw assertions passed; the 2 'fails' were test-script issues (CSS text-transform:uppercase turns 'Key Features' into 'KEY FEATURES' in innerText) — re-verified manually with case-insensitive check and screenshot, the expanded panels render Key Features list correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero shows 'Last updated Jun 2026' — verify this future date is intentional (looks copy-paste future-date placeholder).

Nav active state detection in Nav.jsx uses top<=120 with no lower bound — when scrolled to the very bottom (contact), every section satisfies this so active correctly lands on 'contact' (last wins). Fine but slightly fragile; consider using IntersectionObserver for robustness.

Projects.jsx ProjectRow has two buttons that both toggle the same state — accessible but the title <button> wraps an <h3>, which is valid; ensure screen readers convey it's expandable (consider aria-expanded on both buttons).
Footer/Background and other components were not deep-reviewed for code quality but render correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-page portfolio at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Loader runs ~1.6s then Portfolio fades in. All data-testids listed in the review_request are present and correct. Both project-toggle-{id} and project-expand-{id} toggle the same useState. The '+' SVG gets transform: rotate(45deg) when open. NOTE for future test scripts: 'Key Features' label is rendered in CSS uppercase, so use case-insensitive matching in innerText assertions.
